#uv run python training/train_wikitext2_gpt2.py --preset 1b-gsa --seq-length 256 --batch-size 1 --max-steps 100
uv run python training/train_wikitext2_gpt2.py \
  --preset 1b-deepseek-gsa \
  --device cuda \
  --seq-length 2048 \
  --batch-size 6 --max-steps 100 \
  --persistent-workers \
#  --use-torch-compile
